nodes.name: Rhinopomastus
nodes.summary: Rhinopomastus（Rhinopomastus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联4种鸟类，如Forest wood hoopoe、Black scimitarbill、Common scimitarbill等4种鸟类。

nodes.name: Forest wood hoopoe
nodes.summary: Forest wood hoopoe（Rhinopomastus castaneiceps）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Forest wood hoopoe。

nodes.name: Forest wood hoopoe
nodes.summary: The forest wood hoopoe (Rhinopomastus castaneiceps) is a species of bird in the family Phoeniculidae. It is found in Cameroon, Central African Republic, Republic of the Congo, Democratic Republic of the Congo, Ivory Coast, Ghana, Guinea, Liberia, Nigeria, Rwanda, and Uganda. References
